rationale: Scope: `git diff 75e82b52..19bc8114` touches ONLY internal/complete/panel_advisory.go (+40/-8, doc comment + two comma-ok guards) and panel_advisory_test.go (+51, three subtests). No internal/approve, internal/gitutil, docs, ADR, or skill change; `git diff main -- internal/gitutil/` is empty; BranchExistsE/show-ref grep over internal/complete + internal/approve is 0-hit. Grounding: new error strings sit in the pre-existing fail-closed message family ('present-but-corrupt ... cannot prove the bead is obligation-free' / 'cannot prove which obligations are already satisfied', em-dash style matching the untouched L526 message); gofmt -l clean and the reworded doc comment is plain prose with no backtick code span containing shell escapes, so the gofmt doc-comment gotcha does not apply. F3-1 holds: uncoveredPendingObligations remains the single shared core; CheckPendingObligations (L614) and reconcilePendingRefutations (L681) both call it directly, reconcile still bypassing the erroring wrapper. No contradiction: the guard tightens the R3 fail-closed contract for the present-null class while the absent-key §6 pristine no-op is explicitly preserved and pinned by a subtest. Build green; all 12 TestPendingObligationPredicate subtests pass. Round-1 APPROVE lens undisturbed.
findings: Delta confined to panel_advisory.go + panel_advisory_test.go; stat confirms 2 files, 83 insertions, 8 deletions.
Fences intact: gitutil diff vs main empty; BranchExistsE/show-ref 0-hit in non-test complete/approve sources.
New present-but-null error messages stylistically consistent with the existing 'cannot prove' fail-closed family.

Shared core preserved: reconcilePendingRefutations calls uncoveredPendingObligations directly (L681); the present-null guard lives in the core, consistent with how present-but-corrupt values already errored there pre-fix — a strengthening, not a behavioral contradiction.
Absent-key no-op path unchanged (comma-ok present==false falls through) and now explicitly regression-pinned by the 'absent key → still nil' subtest.
gofmt clean; doc comment ASCII-safe prose — no code-span/gofmt corruption risk.
